title: Adapter to caption-commons for cleared AV items
output: An AV adapter module (TypeScript) committed via PR targeting caption-commons.
acceptanceCriteria: The adapter filters cleared items by AV media type (audio/video) and routes them to caption-commons.
Rights basis, jurisdiction, attribution, and share-alike obligations are propagated into the caption-commons intake.
The adapter is idempotent (dedup-keyed by item ID + content hash).
An end-to-end test confirms caption-commons receives correctly-attributed AV items.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
context: The caption-commons project produces captions and transcripts for audio-visual content. This adapter routes cleared AV items from the fan-out feed into caption-commons, enabling blind and deaf beneficiaries to access LoC's AV archive. AV transcript/caption work requires its own domain review in the caption-commons project. Unscheduled backlog; depends on adapter-001 being established.
objective: Build the adapter that routes cleared AV items from the fan-out contract to caption-commons, filtering by AV media type, propagating rights basis, jurisdiction, and attribution, and satisfying caption-commons intake requirements.
